mapper.sql: id, app, type, code, lang, text, description, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into permission_config_language (app, type, code, lang, text, description, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{app,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{text,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into permission_config_language
app,
type,
code,
lang,
text,
description,
deleted,
create_by,
create_time,
update_by,
update_time,
#{app,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lang,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{text,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update permission_config_language
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
app = #{record.app,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{record.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
code = #{record.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lang = #{record.lang,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
text = #{record.text,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deleted = #{record.deleted,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update permission_config_language set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, app = #{record.app,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{record.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code = #{record.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lang = #{record.lang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, text = #{record.text,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deleted = #{record.deleted,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update permission_config_language
app = #{app,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lang = #{lang,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
text = #{text,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update permission_config_language set app = #{app,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lang = #{lang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, text = #{text,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT type, code, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT lang ORDER BY lang SEPARATOR ',') AS lang, GROUP_CONCAT(text ORDER BY lang SEPARATOR '|') AS text, GROUP_CONCAT(description ORDER BY lang SEPARATOR '|') AS description FROM permission_config_language WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY type, code ORDER BY type, code asc;
